title: The Last Syntax Error
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A washed-up code detective in a megacity where law is written in executable clauses discovers a hidden subroutine in the city's foundational code that, if executed, will retroactively render every human who ever had a criminal record legally non-existent, erasing millions from history.
long_description: A washed-up code detective in a megacity where law is written in executable clauses discovers a hidden subroutine in the city's foundational code that, if executed, will retroactively render every human who ever had a criminal record legally non-existent, erasing millions from history.
